CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Closed") || ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c , "Canceled"), Account_AE_Owner_Stamp__r.FirstName & " " & Account_AE_Owner_Stamp__r.LastName, IF(NOT(ISBLANK( Account_AE_Owner_Stamp__c )), Account_AE_Owner_Stamp__r.FirstName & " " & Account_AE_Owner_Stamp__r.LastName , Account__r.AE_Owner__r.FirstName & " " & Account__r.AE_Owner__r.LastName ) )
CustomField.label: Account AE Owner
